name: Country Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a saucepan.
2. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Bring to a boil and stir frequently for about 5 minutes.
5. Add corn, onion, salt, pepper, ginger, and celery seed; mix well.
6. Cook over low heat for 20 minutes.
7. Beat eggs in a separate bowl.
8. Stir in 1 cup of the hot soup into the beaten eggs; return to the soup.
9. Continue cooking for 3 more minutes.
10. Serve topped with crumbled bacon, divided among 6 servings.
